summary: A bag/box of cereal (or similar dry food) is sitting on the kitchen counter next to the microwave.

payload.answer: A bag/box of cereal (packaged dry food) is on the counter.
supporting_claims: In frames 0 and 1, a packaged dry food item that looks like cereal is sitting on the counter next to the microwave.

uncertainties: The packaging is too blurry to read precisely; it looks like cereal or another dry boxed/bagged food, but the exact product name/type cannot be confirmed.

evidence_items.claim: A packaged dry food item (appears like a cereal bag/box) is on the counter next to the microwave.
